events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON. Need decide compliance for baseplates & anchor bolts with insufficient anchor bolt projection per API RP 686. Work rough-complete. Need output JSON only. Need determine decision fail because insufficient projection likely non-compliant. Need risk? Anchor bolt projection insufficient can affect anchorage capacity, nut engagement, equipment stability. Could be high risk if operating asset. component_conditions installed-defective and non-compliant. percent_complete maybe 80? value? Not asked numeric reading. Could leave 0. sound_source etc default empty/zero. workable empty. findings: anchor bolt projection below required minimum; insufficient thread engagement for nuts; non-compliant with API RP 686. actions: verify required projection per OEM/API, replace/extend anchor bolts or add threaded extension as approved, re-torque and inspect. rationale: API RP 686 requires anchor bolts to project sufficiently above baseplate to allow full nut engagement and proper anchorage; observed insufficient projection compromises integrity. references: API RP 686. Need ensure valid JSON.
